description_long: This is a simple, cylindrical cup with a smooth, unadorned surface and a rounded rim. The cup is predominantly white and features a single, sturdy handle attached to one side, allowing for easy gripping. The interior is hollow, designed to hold liquids such as coffee, tea, or water. The handle is seamlessly integrated into the body, with no visible seams or joints. The cup's surface appears to be made of ceramic or porcelain, giving it a hard, glossy finish. There are no visible logos, patterns, or decorative elements on the exterior.
description: A plain white ceramic cup with a smooth surface and a single rounded handle, designed for holding beverages.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top and the handle clearly on the right side.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle visible on the left edge, mostly showing the back of the cup.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle fully visible on the left, showing the cup's cylindrical shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no handle visible, displaying the plain side of the cup.
